title: Moovabletech
subtitle: Mobility & Logistics Platform
overview: Moovabletech is a mobility and logistics platform designed to streamline urban transportation and delivery services across African cities. The product focuses on reliability, real-time tracking, and seamless payment integration.
problem: Urban mobility in African cities faced challenges with unreliable tracking, inconsistent pricing, fragmented payment options, and poor user experience across existing platforms.
solution: A unified mobility platform with real-time GPS tracking, transparent fare calculation, multi-payment support (card, mobile money, cash), and an intuitive interface optimized for low-bandwidth environments.

features.title: Real-Time Tracking
features.description: Live GPS tracking with estimated arrival times and route visualisation, optimised for low-bandwidth networks.

features.title: Multi-Payment Gateway
features.description: Integrated card payments, mobile money (Paystack, Flutterwave), and cash options with instant confirmation.

features.title: Fleet Management Dashboard
features.description: Operator dashboard for managing drivers, monitoring trips, and viewing analytics on fleet performance.

architecture.title: Mobile-First with Real-Time Sync
architecture.description: The platform uses a mobile-first architecture with Firestore real-time listeners for live tracking updates and a Node.js backend for fare calculation and payment orchestration.
highlights: Firestore real-time listeners for live GPS updates
Serverless fare calculation via Firebase Functions
Offline-first data synchronisation for low-connectivity areas

results.description: Beta users across Lagos and Accra
